title: LHP UC Tags File
description: External Unity Catalog tags sidecar referenced by a write target's tags_file. Identified by 'table' (or its accepted alias 'name'); 'version' is optional (absent means 1.0). Carries tags (table-level) and/or columns (column-level).

version.description: Optional tags-file format version: 1.0 or 1.0.0. Absent means 1.0.

table.description: The write target's (unqualified, post-substitution) table name. Should equal the write target's 'table'; a mismatch logs a warning (LHP-CFG-068) and generation proceeds using the write target's table.

name.description: Alias for 'table', accepted for cross-compatibility with schema-file / ODCS conventions. Informational: 'table' is canonical and wins when both are present; a differing 'name' logs a warning (LHP-CFG-068).

tags.description: Table-level tags. An explicit empty mapping means 'managed with an empty set' under remove_undeclared_tags.

columns.description: Column-level tags: a list of {name, tags} entries.

tags.description: This column's tags (may be empty). '' or ~ is a key-only tag.
